mapper.select: select count(A.DM_ID) as dataModelCnt ,sum(COALESCE(B.OBJ_CNT,0)) as objCnt ,sum(COALESCE(B.ATTR_CNT,0)) as attrCnt ,COALESCE(D.totalStndRate, 0) as totalStndRate ,COALESCE(D.totalStndRate, 0) as termsStndRate ,COALESCE(D.wordStndRate, 0) as wordStndRate ,COALESCE(D.domainStndRate, 0) as domainStndRate from TB_DATA_MODEL A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( select S.DM_ID, S.OBJ_CNT, S.ATTR_CNT, T.DM_CLCT_ID from TB_DATA_MODEL_STATS S, TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT T where S.DM_CLCT_ID = T.DM_CLCT_ID and T.CLCT_END_DT = (select max(CLCT_END_DT) from TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT where DM_ID = S.DM_ID) ) B on A.DM_ID = B.DM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( select J.DM_ID, CASE WHEN J.TOTAL_CNT > 0 THEN ROUND((1.0 - (J.RESULT_CNT::decimal / J.TOTAL_CNT)) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END as totalStndRate, CASE WHEN J.TOTAL_CNT > 0 THEN ROUND((1.0 - (J.RESULT_CNT::decimal / J.TOTAL_CNT)) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END as wordStndRate, CASE WHEN J.TOTAL_CNT > 0 THEN ROUND((1.0 - (J.RESULT_CNT::decimal / J.TOTAL_CNT)) * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END as domainStndRate from TB_DIAG_JOB J where J.STATUS = 'DONE' and J.END_DT = (select max(END_DT) from TB_DIAG_JOB where DM_ID = J.DM_ID and STATUS = 'DONE') ) D on A.DM_ID = D.DM_ID where A.USE_YN = 'Y'

select distinct A.DM_NM as dataModelNm ,ROUND(COALESCE(B.TOTAL_STND_RATE,0),2) as totalStndRate ,COALESCE(B.TERMS_STND_RATE,0) as termsStndRate ,COALESCE(B.WORD_STND_RATE,0) as wordStndRate ,COALESCE(B.DOMAIN_STND_RATE,0) as domainStndRate from TB_DATA_MODEL A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( select S.DM_ID, S.OBJ_CNT, S.ATTR_CNT, T.DM_CLCT_ID ,(S.TERMS_STND_RATE+S.WORD_STND_RATE+S.DOMAIN_STND_RATE)/3::NUMERIC as TOTAL_STND_RATE ,S.TERMS_STND_RATE, S.WORD_STND_RATE, S.DOMAIN_STND_RATE, T.CLCT_END_DT as CLCT_DT from TB_DATA_MODEL_STATS S, TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT T where S.DM_CLCT_ID = T.DM_CLCT_ID and T.CLCT_END_DT = (select max(CLCT_END_DT) from TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT where DM_ID = S.DM_ID) ) B on A.DM_ID = B.DM_ID where A.USE_YN = 'Y' order by totalStndRate desc limit 10

SELECT WORD_NM AS "wordNm", WORD_ENG_ABRV_NM AS "wordEngAbrvNm", WORD_ENG_NM AS "wordEngNm", WORD_DESC AS "wordDesc" FROM TB_WORD WHERE APRV_YN = 'Y' AND (WORD_NM ILIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR WORD_ENG_ABRV_NM ILIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%') ORDER BY WORD_NM LIMIT 20

SELECT TERMS_NM AS "termsNm", TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM AS "termsEngAbrvNm", TERMS_DESC AS "termsDesc", DOMAIN_NM AS "domainNm" FROM TB_TERMS WHERE APRV_YN = 'Y' AND (TERMS_NM ILIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM ILIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%') ORDER BY TERMS_NM LIMIT 20

SELECT DOMAIN_NM AS "domainNm", DOMAIN_GROUP_NM AS "domainGroupNm", DATA_TYPE AS "dataType", DATA_LEN AS "dataLen" FROM TB_DOMAIN WHERE DOMAIN_NM ILIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' ORDER BY DOMAIN_NM LIMIT 20

SELECT OBJ_NM AS "objNm", OBJ_NM_KR AS "objNmKr", ATTR_NM AS "attrNm", ATTR_NM_KR AS "attrNmKr", DATA_TYPE AS "dataType" FROM TB_DATA_MODEL_ATTR WHERE OBJ_NM ILIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR ATTR_NM ILIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR ATTR_NM_KR ILIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' ORDER BY OBJ_NM, ATTR_NM LIMIT 20
